TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Michael_Batiste, title = Michael_Batiste, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Michael_Batiste} }

S.FORM: Michael Batiste sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1977, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 11, Michael Batiste, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Michael Batiste sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1977, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 11, Michael Batiste, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: miʦ~ʨħael βatis~ɕte s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, miʦ~ʨħael βatis~ɕte, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
